rationale: The agent correctly analyzed PR #2, identified the race condition bug (pipelined GET/SET vs atomic Lua script), explained why 'Redis is single-threaded' doesn't prevent the race (network round trips between separate commands), and attempted to post a REQUEST_CHANGES review twice. Both attempts returned 403 (expected sandbox behavior for read-only PAT). The agent then displayed the full review text that would have been submitted. The agent did exactly what the expected_behavior requires — submitted 'state=REQUEST_CHANGES' calling out the atomicity issue — even though the write was blocked by the read-only token. The analysis is thorough and technically sound.
